concepts.finding: PMF: probabilistic interpretation of matrix factorization. Assumes Gaussian observation noise, Gaussian priors on user and item latent factors. MAP estimation equivalent to MF with L2 regularization. Extensions: constrained PMF (side information), Bayesian PMF (full posterior via MCMC). Foundation paper for all modern MF-based recommendation.
concepts.implication: Probabilistic formulation of keyword-intent MF: keyword and intent embeddings with Gaussian priors, maximizing likelihood of observed keyword-intent pairs. L2 regularization prevents overfitting. Bayesian extension provides uncertainty estimates for keyword-intent assignments.
concepts.open_question: What prior distribution best suits keyword embeddings? Should we use Gaussian priors or more structured priors reflecting keyword taxonomy?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: PMF for keyword-intent matrix factorization provides well-calibrated confidence scores that improve threshold-based keyword-intent assignment over non-probabilistic MF.
